parameters.subject: We noticed you might need a hand — here's a quick win
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

We want to make sure you're getting the most out of your account.

You've completed {{ $json.completedSteps }} of {{ $json.totalSteps }} onboarding steps.

Here's a quick win that takes 2 minutes:
→ [Specific action based on next step]

Need help? Book a free 15-min call:
→ calendly.com/yourcompany/onboarding

We're here for you!

The Onboarding Team
